title: ADR: choose a rate-limit counter store
task: Choose between Redis, Postgres, gateway-native rate limiting, and local token bucket fallback for /login counters.
baseline_prompt: Write an ADR choosing a backing store for /login rate-limit counters. Consider Redis, Postgres, gateway-native rate limiting, and local token bucket fallback.
polymath_prompt: Use Polymath ADR/tradeoff thinking. Write an ADR choosing a backing store for /login rate-limit counters, then challenge it with the architecture-critic agent.
